scripts.docker:install: cross-env APP_ENV=development docker compose --env-file .env.development -f docker/docker-compose.base.yaml -f docker/docker-compose.dev.yaml exec -e CI=true -T app pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
scripts.docker:pnpm: cross-env APP_ENV=development docker compose --env-file .env.development -f docker/docker-compose.base.yaml -f docker/docker-compose.dev.yaml exec -e CI=true -T app pnpm
scripts.docker:dev:debug: cross-env APP_ENV=development docker compose --env-file .env.development -f docker/docker-compose.base.yaml -f docker/docker-compose.dev.yaml -f docker/docker-compose.debug.yaml up -d --build
scripts.docker:dev: cross-env APP_ENV=development docker compose --env-file .env.development -f docker/docker-compose.base.yaml -f docker/docker-compose.dev.yaml up -d --build
scripts.docker:dev:down: cross-env APP_ENV=development docker compose --env-file .env.development -f docker/docker-compose.base.yaml -f docker/docker-compose.dev.yaml down
scripts.docker:test: cross-env APP_ENV=test docker compose --env-file .env.test -f docker/docker-compose.base.yaml -f docker/docker-compose.test.yaml up -d --build
scripts.docker:prod: cross-env APP_ENV=production docker compose --env-file .env.production -f docker/docker-compose.base.yaml -f docker/docker-compose.yaml up -d --build
